LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS LAM TU AND JOHN NGUYEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD FACTS FOR ALTER EGO LIABILITY AND HAS FAILED TO IDENTIFY THE PARTY OR PARTIES TO THE CONTRACT. IN THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD WHAT NGUYEN AND LAM DID OR DID NOT DO. NEITHER CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 800 NOR CIVIL CODE SECTION 1719 ARE APPLICABLE TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR RESCISSION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Jesse Ralph (776-1826) for defendants and moving parties

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANTS LAM TU AND JOHN NGUYEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED, TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD FACTS FOR ALTER EGO LIABILITY AND HAS FAILED TO IDENTIFY THE PARTY OR PARTIES TO THE CONTRACT. IN THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD WHAT NGUYEN AND LAM DID OR DID NOT DO. NEITHER CORPORATIONS CODE SECTION 800 NOR CIVIL CODE SECTION 1719 ARE APPLICABLE TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR RESCISSION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/SN)
